title: The Dictator's Guns
writer: Charles Williams, Claude Sautet, Fouli Elia
actors: Lino Ventura, Sylva Koscina, Leo Gordon
plot: Jacques Cournot, a freelance skipper, is hired by Mr Hendrix in Santo Domingo, first of all to advise him regarding the acquisition of a sailing boat. After a thorough inspection of a prospective vessel, the "Dragoon", Cournot rep...
